<problem>
Assign twelve compute jobs to machines W, X, Y, and Z. Each machine must receive exactly three jobs. Minimize total cost while satisfying every interaction. The optimum is unique, but several feasible assignments are close in cost. Return the complete assignment and exact total cost.

J1 | 1 | 30 | 21 | 11
J2 | 29 | 34 | 28 | 5
J3 | 14 | 33 | 2 | 26
J4 | 28 | 31 | 29 | 34
J5 | 16 | 3 | 9 | 11
J6 | 25 | 28 | 7 | 16
J7 | 31 | 4 | 23 | 27
J8 | 25 | 6 | 9 | 21
J9 | 27 | 4 | 4 | 9
J10 | 14 | 1 | 2 | 11
J11 | 29 | 15 | 13 | 28
J12 | 21 | 31 | 23 | 4

Constraints:
- J9 and J12 must use different machines.
- J4 and J8 must use different machines.
- J5 and J6 must use different machines.
- J2 and J4 must use the same machine.
- J2 may use only W or X.
- J12 may use only X or Y.
- J10 may not use W.
- J3 may not use Z.
- If J9 uses Z, then J4 may not use X.
- If J11 uses W, then J8 may not use Y.
- If J7 uses Z, then J1 may not use X.
- If J6 uses Y, then J5 may not use W.
- Exactly one of J7, J4, and J9 must use W.
- Exactly one of J11, J10, and J1 must use X.
</problem>
